Bob Dylan, 9/7/98, Glenfield, New Zealand, North Shore Event Centre, 2CDR

unknown rec, I can listen "levels start too high right at beginning but come down" but I cannot listen the small discontinuity pop described on
LB 796 and LB 2820

CD1

1 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat, 2 Lay, Lady, Lay, 3 Cold Irons Bound, 4 You're A Big Girl Now, 5 Can't Wait, 6 Silvio, 7 Mr. Tambourine Man @, 8 Masters Of War @, 9 Tangled Up In Blue @, 10 The Times They Are A-Changin' @, 11 She Belongs To Me,

CD2

1 'Till I Fell In Love With You, 2 Love Sick, 3 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35, 4 Blowin' In The Wind @, 5 Highway 61 Revisited, 6 Forever Young @
